testcase.name: test_register_duplicate_email_rejected
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supabase_migration.py:91: in test_register_duplicate_email_rejected assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_success_returns_token
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supabase_migration.py:105: in test_login_success_returns_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_valid_token

failure.message: AssertionError: Could not get auth token assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supabase_migration.py:142: in test_verify_valid_token assert headers is not None, "Could not get auth token" E AssertionError: Could not get auth token E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_get_current_user_info
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supabase_migration.py:168: in test_get_current_user_info assert headers is not None E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_create_program
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supabase_migration.py:210: in test_create_program assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create program failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create program failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_list_programs
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supabase_migration.py:223: in test_list_programs assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
